title: hieracium praepallens
intro: Hieracium praepallens, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its rough, hairy leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Hieracium praepallens include its ability to act as a digestive aid, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Hieracium praepallens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
